## v1.0.35 — Installer: any user + any hardware

- **Any user** — assisted NSIS installer shows per-user vs **all users (per-machine)** choice; elevation allowed; all-users shortcuts use correct shell context
- **Any hardware** — single installer bundles **x64 and arm64** Windows builds (auto-selects matching CPU)
- Per-user addon data still lives in each user's `%APPDATA%\AI Video Creator` (correct for shared installs)
